apihelp-cargotables-summary: Waxay soo qaadataa dhammaan jadwalka ku jira nidaamka
apihelp-cargofields-summary: Waxay soo qaadataa dhammaan beeraha ku jira jadwalka la cayimay
apihelp-cargofields-param-table: Shaxda xogta xamuulka ee meelaha la geyn karo
apihelp-cargoquery-param-tables: Shaxda xogta Cargo ama jadwalada lagu baarayo
apihelp-cargoquery-param-fields: Meesha(yada) jadwalka si loo soo ceshado
apihelp-cargoquery-param-where: Shuruudaha su'aasha, oo u dhiganta qodobka SQL WHERE
apihelp-cargoquery-param-join_on: Shuruudaha lagu biirin karo jadwalo badan, oo u dhigma qodobka SQL JOIN ON
apihelp-cargoquery-param-order_by: Kala horraynta natiijooyinka, oo u dhiganta qodobka SQL ORDER BY
apihelp-cargoquery-param-group_by: Goobta(yada) natiijooyinka kooxaynta, oo u dhiganta qodobka SQL GROUP BY
apihelp-cargoquery-param-having: Shuruudaha qiimayaasha kooxaysan, oo u dhigma qodobka SQL HAVING
apihelp-cargoquery-param-limit: Xad ku saabsan tirada natiijooyinka la soo celiyay
apihelp-cargorecreatetables-summary: Waxay dib u abuurtaa hal ama in ka badan miisaska Xamuulka.
apihelp-cargorecreatetables-param-templa: Qaab-dhismeedka miiska(yada) xamuulka la sheegay waa in dib loo sameeyaa
apihelp-cargorecreatetables-param-create: Hadday tahay in xogta la geliyo jadwalka beddelka ah
apihelp-cargorecreatedata-summary: Waxay dib u buuxisaa xogta jadwalka xamuulka.
apihelp-cargorecreatedata-param-table: Shaxda xogta xamuulka si dib loogu buuxiyo
apihelp-cargorecreatedata-param-offset: Bogagga loogu yeero qaab-dhismeedkan, lambarka laga bilaabo raadinta
apihelp-cargorecreatedata-param-replaceO: Hadday tahay in la beddelo safkii hore ee bog kasta inta lagu jiro dib-u-buuxinta jadwalka
apihelp-cargorecreatespecialtable-summar: Waxay abuurtaa miis gaar ah oo xamuul ah.
apihelp-cargorecreatespecialtable-param-: Miiska gaarka ah ee la abuuri doono
Hadday tahay in xogta la geliyo jadwalka beddelka ah
apihelp-cargoautocomplete-summary: Wicitaan otomaatig ah oo ay isticmaasho kordhinta xamuulka.
apihelp-cargoautocomplete-param-limit: Xad ku saabsan tirada natiijooyinka la soo celiyay
apihelp-cargoautocomplete-param-table: Shaxda xamuulka ee lagu raadinayo qiimayaasha
apihelp-cargoautocomplete-param-field: Goobta xamuulka ee lagu raadinayo qiimayaasha
apihelp-cargoautocomplete-param-where: Qodobka "halka" ee weydiinta, iyadoo lagu saleynayo shaandheeyayaasha kale ee la cayimay
apihelp-cargoqueryautocomplete-summary: Wicitaanka dhammaystirka otomaatiga ah ee uu isticmaalo bogga gaarka ah ee CargoQuery (hore loo isticmaali jiray ViewData).
apihelp-cargoqueryautocomplete-param-lim: Xad ku saabsan tirada natiijooyinka la soo celiyay
apihelp-cargoqueryautocomplete-param-tab: Liiska miiska xamuulka ee la xushay iyadoo lagu saleynayo Goobta(yada), Kooxda(yada) iyo Dalbashada si otomaatig ah loo dhammaystiro.
apihelp-cargoformatparams-summary: Waxay heshaa qaybaha bandhigga ee qaab kasta oo weydiimo ah oo Cargo ah.
apierror-cargoquery-invalidfieldalias: Khalad: Magaca loo yaqaan " $1 " ee goobta ayaa ku bilaabma hoosta hoose (_). Tan looma oggola su'aalaha Cargo API.
